rules.name: Displacement texture file must exist
rules.message: Displacement texture file is missing or cannot be resolved.
rules.why: Missing displacement maps can change object silhouettes, create render holes, or make farm renders diverge from approved lookdev. Displacement dependencies must be resolved before publish or farm submission.

rules.name: Displacement amount must stay within the risk budget
rules.message: Displacement amount is above the configured production risk budget.
rules.why: Excessive displacement can explode render time, memory, tessellation, and silhouette changes. Keeping amount within a profile-defined budget reduces farm risk.

rules.name: Material displacement risk score must stay within budget
rules.message: Material displacement risk score exceeds the configured budget.
rules.why: Weighted displacement risk combines amount, subdivision, bounds, and renderer flags into a single farm-risk signal for TD review.

rules.name: Displacement with subdivision requires review
rules.message: Material uses displacement with subdivision enabled.
rules.why: Subdivision combined with displacement increases tessellation cost and farm memory pressure. These materials need TD review before publish.

rules.name: Displacement bounds span must stay within budget
rules.message: Material displacement bounds span exceeds the configured budget.
rules.why: Wide displacement bounds increase silhouette change and memory cost. Tighter bounds keep farm renders predictable.
